title: pollinia ciliata var. formosana
intro: Pollinia ciliata var. formosana, also known as Taiwanese Pollinia, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to Taiwan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Pollinia ciliata var. formosana can be found in tea, infusion, or extract form, and are believed to provide health benefits such as improved immune function and anti-aging properties.
